info.title: ReviewStudio API
info.description:
This document describes the ReviewStudio API and its usage. The headers for all the requests are the following: 
                                            'X-REVIEWSTUDIO-EMAIL' = Email of the admin.
                                            'X-REVIEWSTUDIO-TOKEN' = API Key.

get.description: Get a list of all review files

parameters.name: nest_files
parameters.description: Return the list with nested files like the UI

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page

200.description: Get a list of all review files

post.description: Create a new review file (use either review_file or review_file_url)

201.description: Create a new review file (use either review_file or review_file_url)

parameters.name: delete_all_versions
parameters.description: Specify if you want to delete all versions or not

post.description: Create a new HTML Live URL file

201.description: A JSON object will be returned with 2 keys each containing an array: error - containing an array of error messages, success_ids - containing a list of IDs of the newly created file

post.description: Create a new HTML Capture file

201.description: A JSON object will be returned with 2 keys each containing an array: error - containing an array of error messages, success_ids - containing a list of IDs of the newly created file
A JSON object will be returned with 2 keys each containing an array: error - containing an array of error messages, success_ids - containing a list of IDs of the newly created file

get.description: Get a list of users for the review

200.description: Get a list of users for the review

post.description: Add a single user to the review

201.description: Add a single user to the review

delete.description: Delete a single user from the review

204.description: Delete a single user from the review

put.description: Update user approval status in the review

200.description: Update user approval status in the review

get.description: Get a list of decisions by users for the review

200.description: Get a list of decisions by users for the review

200.description: Get a list of approved by users for the review

get.description: Get a list of rejected by users for the review

200.description: Get a list of rejected by users for the review

200.description: Get a list of approved-changes by users for the review

get.description: Get a list of rejectedx by users for the review

200.description: Get a list of rejectedx by users for the review

get.description: Get a list of pending actions by users for the review

200.description: Get a list of pending actions by users for the review

get.description: Get a list of all webhooks

200.description: Get a list of all webhooks

get.description: Get a list of all notes from the most recent file versions

200.description: Get a list of all notes from the most recent file versions

get.description: Get a list of all notes from all file versions

200.description: Get a list of all notes from all file versions

get.description: Get a list of all notes

200.description: Get a list of all notes

get.description: Get a list of users for the account

200.description: Get a list of users for the account

get.description: Get a single user from the account

200.description: Get a single user from the account

delete.description: Delete a single user from the account

204.description: Delete a single user from the account

delete.description: Delete a client. Note that at least one of the parameters (delete_all, move_to_client_id) must be sent!

parameters.name: delete_all
parameters.description: Set this to true if you want to delete the client and all associated projects/reviews

parameters.name: move_to_client_id
parameters.description: Specify the ID of the new client where projects/reviews should be moved to

204.description: Delete a client. Note that at least one of the parameters (delete_all, move_to_client_id) must be sent!

delete.description: Delete a project. Note that all associated reviews will be deleted

204.description: Delete a project. Note that all associated reviews will be deleted

get.description: Get a list of all webhooks

200.description: Get a list of all webhooks

get.description: Get a list of all workflows

200.description: Get a list of all workflows

get.description: Get all visible clients for the current user

200.description: Get all visible clients for the current user

get.description: Get all projects for the client

200.description: Get all projects for the client

parameters.name: nest_files
parameters.description: Return the list with nested files like the UI

parameters.description: Number of results to return per page

parameters.description: Specify if you want to delete all versions or not

time_limit_to_edit_annotations.description: Time in milliseconds to allow editing annotations

time_limit_to_edit_approval.description: Time in milliseconds to allow editing approval decisions

allow_approval_confirmation.description: Allow users to leave a message when approving or rejecting files.

print_all_pages.description: Whether all pages should be printed or only pages with comments

time_limit_to_edit_annotations.description: Time in milliseconds to allow editing annotations. Pass null for unlimited time

time_limit_to_edit_approval.description: Time in milliseconds to allow editing approval decisions. Pass null for unlimited time

print_all_pages.description: Whether all pages should be printed or only pages with comments

allow_approval_confirmation.description: Allow users to leave a message when approving content

show_confirmation_message.description: Show confirmation message when approving content

allow_guest_access.description: Anyone with the link can access

status_after_deadline.description: After deadline set Review status to:

allow_guest_access.description: Anyone with the link can access

status_after_deadline.description: After deadline set Review status to:

enable_private_mode.description: Whether private mode is enabled or not

private_mode.description: The type of privacy mode to use in the review

file_count.description: Total number of most files (only most recent versions) in the review

webhook_url.description: URL to send webhook events for this review

status_after_deadline.description: Status set after deadline is past

sort_files_by.description: Sort files by the following field

comments_count.description: Number of comments from the latest versions of all files

tasks_count.description: Number of tasks from the latest versions of all files

open_tasks_count.description: Number of open tasks from the latest versions of all files

completed_tasks_count.description: Number of completed tasks from the latest versions of all files

my_open_tasks_count.description: Number of my open tasks from the latest versions of all files

reviews_count.description: Number of reviews in this project

approvals.description: Number of approvals of the user in the current review

external.description: Whether user is external (true) or internal (false)

order.description: Order of the file added in review.

version_number.description: Version number of the file uploaded

review_url.description: Direct URL to review the file

hidden.description: Whether file is hidden or not

locked.description: Whether file is locked or not

hidden.description: Whether file is hidden or not

locked.description: Whether file is locked or not

enable_private_mode.description: Enable private mode for the review

guests_are_external_users.description: Whether guests are external users or not

labels.description: Array of labels to add to the review (note that this will replace all existing labels)

deadline_at.description: Deadline date (This parameter is only required if deadline_active is set to true)

status_after_deadline.description: Status to set after deadline (This parameter is only required if deadline_active is set to true)

send_deadline_reminder.description: Whether a deadline reminder should be sent

sort_files_by.description: Sort files by the following field

webhook_url.description: URL to send webhook events for this review

urls.description: Array of URLs to create review files.

file_type.description: The file type of the file. If this parameter is empty we will try to find the appropriate file type

source.description:
This parameter can be used to specify what the file might contain or be.
                                         For example, you might be uploading a zip that contains a HTML page so you would pass html_zip here.
